doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_get_emax_min (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L88-L92). Two-line C body: `return MPFR_EMAX_MIN`. Returns the smallest legal value the active emax (maximum exponent) may take.

MPFR_EMAX_MIN = (1 - MPFR_EXP_INVALID), evaluating to -4611686018427387903 on 64-bit systems (= 1 - 2^62). The TS port hardcodes this constant.

Tag minimums per Rule 7 inapplicable; single happy case (carve-out).
divergence_from_c: C returns mpfr_exp_t; TS returns bigint. Value hardcoded to -4611686018427387903 per probed system libmpfr.
refs: mpfr/src/exceptions.c L88-L92 -- the C reference body.
